arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho drops Chelsea transfer bombshell with five-word Man United statement
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has appeared to end any speculation over a move to Chelsea from Manchester United before Monday night's transfer deadline. And Garnacho also appears to have hinted that he won't be making the move to Stamford Bridge before Monday's 11pm deadline.

arts.ttl: Bowen pounces on Colwill error to put Hammers ahead!
arts.sum: Jarrod Bowen gives West Ham the lead after taking advantage of a Levi Colwill mistake!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to sign Chelsea centre-back Axel Disasi on loan
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reached an agreement with Premier League rivals Chelsea over a loan move for France international centre-back Axel Disasi (26), according to The Telegraph’s Matt Law. Villa were…

arts.ttl: What Chelsea plan to do with new signing Mathis Amougou after Strasbourg loan suggestions - journalist
LIVE: Chelsea drop goalkeeper Sanchez for visit of West Ham
arts.sum: Chelsea look to boost their push for the Champions League places against West Ham. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Bobby Zamora reacts as West Ham seal Deadline Day signing
arts.sum: Bobby Zamora has wished Evan Ferguson well after confirming his loan to West Ham on deadline day. The Republic of Ireland international completed his switch... The post Bobby Zamora reacts as West Ham seal Deadline Day signing appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Chelsea signed £20m Arsenal star and player Arsene Wenger was gutted left in January
arts.sum: Chelsea are notorious for making the most of the January transfer window, with The Blues snagging several high-profile signings over the years

arts.ttl: Official: Dortmund take Chelsea midfielder on loan
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have signed Chelsea's Carney Chukwuemeka for the remainder of the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville agree with key Enzo Maresca Chelsea vs West Ham decision
arts.sum: With Robert Sanchez dropped by Enzo Maresca for Chelsea's Monday night clash with West Ham, pundits Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville agree the goalkeeper has 'used up his credits'. Maresca had hinted that there was a choice to be made of who will start in net following Sanchez's recent mistakes in matches against Wolverhampton Wanderers and Manchester City.
